name: Luara

skills.name: Serpent's Envoy
skills.description: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.

skills.name: Deadly Fang
skills.description: Activates a serpent blade and gains Movement Speed. She can quickly scale walls should she run into them during this period.

skills.name: Furtive Attack
skills.description: Summons the Fire Serpent at the target location, which then moves toward her, damaging and slowing enemies in its path. If serpent blades are active, it deals additional damage to enemies. If not, the cooldown is reduced.

skills.name: Blazing Glare
skills.description: Releases the Fire Serpent in the target direction, dealing damage and blinding enemies in its path, and gains a serpent blade. During this time, both attacking and being attacked will accumulate Fury. At full Fury, deals area damage and launches enemies.

skillsZh.name: 蛇焰使者
skillsZh.description: 盧雅那的普通攻擊會施放環刃切割敵人並造成傷害，每次切割命中敵人可減少1技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 致命獠牙
skillsZh.description: 觸發一把環刃並獲得加速，期間遇到牆壁可以快速翻越1次。

skillsZh.name: 蛇吻突襲
skillsZh.description: 在指定位置召喚火蛇，之後火蛇會向自己移動，對沿路敵人造成傷害和減速。有環刃時，額外對敵人造成傷害。若無環刃則縮減冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 焚火灼目
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向施放火蛇，對沿路敵人造成傷害和目盲，並獲得一枚環刃。期間，攻擊和受到攻擊均會累積能量，能量滿後會造成範圍傷害和擊飛。

tips: Build: Sparkforged Dagger, Mortal Punisher, Eternity Blade.
tipsZh: 盧雅那（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 52.66%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：閃電匕首、制裁之刃、無盡戰刃.

patchHistory.change: Reduced Mana consumption and adjusted skill damage.

patchHistory.detail: Luara's passive made her overly reliant on Critical Rate equipment. We wanted to give her a playstyle that utilizes attack effects, so we adjusted the Critical Rate and attack effect aspects of her skillset. Also, since Luara gained serpent blades whenever she performs kills or assists, her performance was very dependent on the match situation. We hope that these changes will give her more consistency. Finally, we have also improved her playability and the display of some mechanics.

patchHistoryZh.change: 減少法力消耗，調整技能傷害

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「盧雅那的被動機制使她對暴擊裝備過度依賴，我們希望未來她可以擁有一套攻擊特效流的玩法，因此調整了暴擊率和攻擊特效衰減比例。此外，盧雅那參與擊殺和助攻可以獲得環刃，這讓盧雅那在不同局勢的戰鬥中表現落差較大，我們希望她可以更加穩定。最後，本次升級還改善了她的機制顯示和操作手感。」

faqs.question: Is Luara good in current season?
faqs.answer: Luara is Tier S Marksman with 52.66% win rate, 1.55% pick rate, and 0.19% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Luara build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sparkforged Dagger, Mortal Punisher, Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday, Overlord's Might.

faqs.question: How to counter Luara?
faqs.answer: Pick Lapulapu, Ata. Strong into Diaochan, Mulan, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 盧雅那 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 盧雅那 為 S 梯度，勝率 52.66%、選取 1.55%、禁用 0.19%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 盧雅那 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：閃電匕首、制裁之刃、無盡戰刃、仁者破曉、末世、強者破軍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 盧雅那？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lapulapu、Ata。盧雅那 克制 Diaochan、Mulan、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Mulan, Lam. Weak into: Lapulapu, Ata.

guide.overview: Luara is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 53.0% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Luara: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Shadow Ripper, Boots of Fortitude, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Luara's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Deadly Fang → Furtive Attack → Blazing Glare → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Blazing Glare (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Deadly Fang is your lane trade tool. Furtive Attack second. Blazing Glare whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Deadly Fang → Furtive Attack → Blazing Glare → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Luara is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.6% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Luara. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Luara vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Luara has +3.7% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Luara when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Luara vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Luara has +2.9% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Luara when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Luara excels into Diaochan, Mulan, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Lapulapu, Ata without team peel.
